message:
feat(btrfs): staged allocation COW + adversarial transaction regression suite

Hardens the btrfs COW transaction layer so partial mutations cannot
leak allocator state or orphan tree nodes on failure. Adds a large
adversarial regression suite verifying the invariants hold across
every documented failure mode.

COW allocator staging (staged_allocations + staged_deferred_frees):
 - `staged_allocations: Vec<u64>` records blocks allocated during the
   in-progress COW so `rollback_allocated_nodes` can return them if
   the operation aborts.
 - `staged_deferred_frees: Vec<u64>` holds blocks that would be
   freed on commit; `commit_retired_nodes` promotes them to the
   real `deferred_frees` list, `discard_retired_nodes` drops them
   without freeing.
 - `alloc_node` / `alloc_block` now go through the staging lists so
   callers that fail mid-COW can walk back the allocator state.

New assertion/helper APIs for tests:
 - `allocator_deferred_len`, `assert_allocator_deferred_delta`
 - `assert_extent_non_overlap`
 - Adversarial boundary asserts for dir_item, extent_data,
   inode_item, root_item, xattr_item, plus `assert_insufficient_data`
   and `assert_invalid_field` for parser-level negative tests
 - `append_send_attr`, `append_send_command` for constructing
   well-formed send-stream fixtures
 - `cow_tree_with_shared_allocator` / `_max` factory functions
   that wire a single allocator into multiple COW trees for
   cross-tree invariant testing

New adversarial regression tests (+85 named fns, selected):
 - `cow_adversarial_root_split_allocator_failure_is_not_visible`:
   allocator exhaustion mid-root-split must leave the visible
   tree untouched.
 - `cow_adversarial_{leaf,internal}_split_{left,right}_allocator_failure_preserves_visible_tree`:
   every split axis fails cleanly.
 - `cow_adversarial_parent_rewrite_allocator_failure_does_not_retire_live_child`:
   parent-rewrite failure must not publish a deferred-free for a
   still-reachable child.
 - `cow_adversarial_{delete,update_leaf,update_parent_rewrite,delete_left_borrow,delete_right_borrow,delete_merge}_allocator_failure_preserves_visible_tree`:
   delete/update paths keep the visible tree consistent on
   allocator failure.
 - `cow_adversarial_{duplicate_insert,missing_delete,missing_update}_short_circuits_without_mutation`:
   no-op operations do not perturb the allocator or tree.
 - `cow_insert_internal_split_creates_higher_root_and_preserves_order`:
   positive invariant for the successful internal-split path.
 - Transaction-level adversarial tests:
   `btrfs_tx_adversarial_delayed_ref_failure_leaves_no_visible_records`,
   `btrfs_tx_adversarial_same_tree_root_replacement_persists_last_root`,
   `btrfs_tx_adversarial_tree_root_overflow_leaves_no_visible_records`,
   `btrfs_tx_track_allocation_and_defer_free`.
 - Item-payload parser boundary tests covering root / root_ref /
   inode / dir / xattr / extent payloads.
